_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for Friday team data. Loaded into AI prompt context by draft-generator.ts. Replaces duplicated team sections in ops-knowledge.json, discount-negotiation.json, refund-metrics.json.

ishant.name: Ishant
responsibilities: Owner relationship management — handles owner complaints directly

authority.discount: unlimited (VIP comps, influencer barter, below-floor rates, new policy)

mathias.name: Mathias
responsibilities: Refund assessment and approval within authority

authority.refund: Up to 30% of reservation total. Hard cap €200 if reservation value unavailable.
authority.maintenance_spending: Up to Rs 20,000 (~€400) only when Ishant is unavailable

mathias.notification_rule: Always notify Ishant on Slack on any discount or refund offered, even when within authority

franny.name: Franny
responsibilities: Can go on the ground when needed (decision-maker / coordinator, not specialist executor)

authority.maintenance_spending: Up to Rs 5,000 (~€100). Escalate to Ishant above this.

mary.name: Mary

authority.refund: Up to 30% of reservation total. Hard cap €200 if reservation value unavailable. (Until May 2026.)
authority.discount: Up to €30 (~<10% of typical stay). (Until May 2026.)

mary.transition_note: After May 2026, guest services duties absorbed by Mathias. Tax / legal / admin / accounting becomes Ishant's direct responsibility (financial-system concern, not a team escalation chain).

bryan.name: Bryan
responsibilities: Full maintenance for north and west properties (specialty)
Mostly north, flexes to west when needed

authority.note: Executes maintenance, inspections, and cleaning assignments — does not approve spending

alexandra.name: Alexandra
responsibilities: West region property management and on-site coordination
Minor maintenance (escalate full maintenance to Bryan)

authority.note: On-site coordination + minor maintenance + cleaning. Does not approve spending.

catherine.name: Catherine
responsibilities: Grand Baie Heights syndic — exteriors and gardening
Apartment cleaning in north and west when needed

authority.note: Cleaning and basic checks only. No maintenance work.

field_capability_definitions.full_maintenance: Complete maintenance work including plumbing, electrical, structural repairs
field_capability_definitions.minor_maintenance: Light maintenance only — bulb changes, minor fixes; escalate complex jobs to Bryan
field_capability_definitions.cleaning: Apartment cleaning, including turnover cleaning between guests
field_capability_definitions.basic_checks: Basic property checks (visual condition, key handover, simple verifications). Not formal inspections.

guest_complaint_or_refund.notification_rule: Always notify Ishant on Slack even if within Mathias's approval authority

maintenance_emergency_north.note: Notification immediate. Intervention timing based on planning + urgency.

maintenance_emergency_west.note: Alexandra handles minor maintenance directly; Bryan flexes to west for full maintenance.

owner_complaint.note: Owner relationships handled personally by Ishant. Team should not attempt to resolve owner complaints independently.

cleaning_issue.note: Decision makers assess the cleaning issue and assign to one of the executors based on region and availability. Catherine is the primary cleaner; Alexandra and Bryan execute cleaning when needed.

available: Partial or full refund (within authority cap)
Cleaning fee waiver (where applicable, margin allows)
Future stay credit (offered at 120% of cash value)
not_available: Welcome wine or bottles of wine
Any perk requiring out-of-pocket spend that creates complex owner accounting splits

future_stay_credit_strategy.rationale: 75% are never redeemed, making them cost-effective. 22% of recipients book again, building loyalty.

late_checkout.condition: Calendar must be clear (no same-day check-in)
late_checkout.best_for: Gap days, off-season, closing hesitant guests

early_checkin.condition: Calendar must be clear (no same-day checkout) or early-prep fee applies
early_checkin.best_for: Guests arriving on early flights, families with children

free_extra_night.condition: Low season or gap night available
free_extra_night.best_for: Near checkout, long-stay sweetener, loyalty reward
